tagline: Trusted Pool Care in West Phoenix

hero.headline:
Family-Owned Pool Care West Valley
Families Trust
hero.subheadline: For over 22 years, Brian and Susan Wright have kept West Valley pools crystal clear so families can focus on making memories. Licensed, bonded, and insured — your pool is in expert hands.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Arizona Pool Owners
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full remodels, Arizona Mirage handles every aspect of pool care so you can enjoy your backyard oasis year-round.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, and equipment checks every week. Your pool stays swim-ready through every Arizona season.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, timers, and plumbing — we diagnose fast and fix it right. Most repairs completed same-visit.

cards.title: Acid Wash & Deep Clean
cards.description: Green pool or heavy staining? Our acid wash and chlorine bath treatments restore your pool surface to a clean, bright finish.

cards.title: Tile & Calcium Cleaning
cards.description: Professional removal of calcium and mineral buildup from pool tiles, restoring them to their original sparkling appearance.

cards.title: Pool Remodels & Upgrades
cards.description: Full pool renovation, cool decking, automation systems, and handrail installation. Transform your pool into a modern backyard retreat.

cards.title: Reverse Osmosis Treatment
cards.description: Advanced water purification that removes dissolved solids, calcium, and contaminants — no draining required. Pure, fresh pool water.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We'll provide an honest, no-pressure estimate — usually within 24 hours. No contracts, no obligations.

steps.title: We Take Care of It
steps.description: Brian and the team arrive on schedule with 22 years of hands-on expertise. Cleaning, chemistry, repairs — everything handled by licensed professionals.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all year. Not satisfied? We come back and make it right. That's the Arizona Mirage promise.

about.label: Why West Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Honesty and Hard Work
about.description: Brian and Susan Wright started Arizona Mirage in 2004, building the business from the ground up after relocating from Illinois. Brian brings technical expertise in commercial diving and welding inspection, while Susan keeps the operations running with precision. Over 22 years, they've earned a BBB membership, a BuildZoom score of 98, and the trust of families across 14 West Valley cities.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: ROC #323327 — fully licensed with the Arizona Registrar of Contractors. Your property is protected on every visit.

features.title: BBB Member Since 2007
features.description: Nearly two decades of Better Business Bureau membership and a BuildZoom top 16% contractor ranking speak for themselves.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with any service? We come back and make it right at no extra charge. Your satisfaction is our reputation.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the service level that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — at no extra charge. We've built our reputation over 22 years by standing behind every job, and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. For green pool emergencies or urgent repairs, we'll get there as fast as possible. Call us at 623-537-9811 and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Surprise, Phoenix, Glendale, Peoria, Goodyear, Buckeye, Avondale, Litchfield Park, Sun City, Waddell, Wickenburg, Wittman, Youngtown, and surrounding West Valley communities.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We hold ROC License #323327 with the Arizona Registrar of Contractors. We're fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We've also been a BBB member since 2007 with a BuildZoom score of 98.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll know exactly what was done after each visit.

faqs.question: Can you handle equipment repairs and remodels too?
faqs.answer: Yes — we're a full-service pool company. From weekly cleaning to pump replacements, tile work, automation systems, cool decking, and complete remodels, we handle it all in-house.

testimonials.name: John D.
testimonials.text: Very knowledgeable, timely and friendly service. Will definitely continue using Arizona Mirage Pool Service.

testimonials.name: Nina O.
testimonials.text: I contacted several pool companies to replace my 15 year old pool equipment. Only one company returned my calls. Arizona Mirage came through when no one else would.

testimonials.name: Haley B.
testimonials.text: These guys go above and beyond. Hard working, solid explanations and concerned with customer satisfaction.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pool care from a family that's been doing this for 22 years.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every estimate
